display.purpose: Page titles in the app shell.

body.purpose: Default UI copy; max 65–75ch in prose.

mono.purpose: Code, IDs, technical labels via Fira Code.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action — one per view when possible.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { appearance: none; background: oklch(0.594 0.123 166); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.12 166); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.594 0.123 166); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { appearance: none; background: oklch(0.934 0 0); color: oklch(0.281 0 0); font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.90 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.594 0.123 166); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary actions in toolbars and dense UI.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { appearance: none; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.159 0 0); font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.982 0 0); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.594 0.123 166); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default form field on Surface background.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.159 0 0); font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.861 0 0); border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.493 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.594 0.123 166); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.594 0.123 166 / 0.25); }

components.name: App Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item — default and active.
components.html: DashboardSettings
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.493 0 0); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.982 0 0); color: oklch(0.159 0 0); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.970 0.011 244); color: oklch(0.568 0.167 251); font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.594 0.123 166); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat container — border at rest, no ghost shadow.
components.html:
Overview

Account activity for the last 30 days.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.861 0 0); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px 20px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.159 0 0); line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: 'Segoe UI Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: oklch(0.493 0 0); line-height: 1.55; }

narrative.overview: Clarus treats clarity as architecture, not decoration. The visual system is a confident SaaS frame: neutral surfaces, precise type, and a single Verified Mint accent that marks action without shouting. Depth is earned through surface steps and subtle lift on elevated layers — not stacked ghost cards or decorative glass.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral canvas with chroma-0 neutrals; brand hue lives in accent and focus
Segoe UI Variable + Fira Code; Georgia for editorial moments only
Subtle shadows only on elevated layers
Light and dark modes share the same direct personality

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Verified Mint appears on primary actions, focus rings, and one wayfinding element per view. If more than ~10% of a screen reads as accent, remove color until hierarchy returns.

rules.name: The Neutral Canvas Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds stay achromatic (chroma 0). Warmth and personality come from accent, typography, and content — not sand-tinted body backgrounds.

rules.name: The Readable Muted Rule
rules.body: Muted foreground (oklch 0.493) is the floor for secondary text on Canvas — never lighter grays that fail AA.

rules.name: The No Ghost Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a wide soft shadow on the same element. Pick border OR shadow for separation.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and list rows use surface contrast and borders at rest. Shadow appears on interaction or elevation tier change only.

dos: Do use Verified Mint for one primary action per view and focus-visible rings.
Do keep neutrals achromatic; let accent and typography carry brand.
Do use shadcn-vue components from @/components/ui/* — extend, don't hand-roll primitives.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — crossfade or instant state changes.
Do test muted text and placeholders at WCAG AA on Canvas and Surface.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS scaffolding — cream backgrounds, gradient heroes, hero metrics, eyebrow kickers on every section, identical icon-card grids.
Don't over-design — glassmorphism, paired border-plus-wide-shadow ghost cards, oversized radii (24px+ on cards), decorative motion.
Don't clutter like enterprise dense UI — tiny gray text, cramped tables, no breathing room.
Don't go overly playful — sketchy illustrations, bouncy elastic motion, loud decorative color.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders (>1px colored accent), or decorative grid/stripe backgrounds.
Don't stack nested cards — one surface level per grouping.
